description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:latest image with the docker:dind service and sets DOCKER_TLS_CERTDIR to /certs. Define a single stage called build and a job named docker-image that runs in the build stage, only on tag pipelines. In the before_script log in to the GitLab Container Registry with $CI_REGISTRY_USER and $CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD, then in the script build the image with docker build -t "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME" ., tag it as latest with docker tag "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME" "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:latest", push both tags, and in after_script log out from $CI_REGISTRY.
